title: rungia adnata
intro: Rungia adnata, a plant species native to Southeast Asia, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Rungia adnata is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
